title: Vanilla Choc Chip
description: Primarily vanilla Minecraft with a few sweet additions here and there.
body:
**Vanilla Choc Chip** keeps to the default vanilla Minecraft experience, but adds some good quality of life and visual mods to really improve the experience.

From _Iris_ shaders, to _3D skins_, and multiple mods adding beautiful particles, the world will feel more vibrant than ever. And with performance mods such as _Ferrite Core_ and _Entity Culling_, anyone should be able to play.
